description_long: This is a three-tiered chocolate drip cake adorned with an abundant assortment of fresh fruits. Each tier features alternating layers of chocolate and cream, with a glossy chocolate ganache dripping elegantly down the sides. The top and edges of each tier are lavishly decorated with whole strawberries, raspberries, blueberries, cherries, and a few green leaves for accent. The cake sits on a round, flat brown base that appears to be a cake board. The overall appearance is rich, festive, and inviting, with a rustic yet elegant presentation. The cake's surface is textured by the fruits and the flowing chocolate, creating a visually dynamic and appetizing centerpiece.
description: A three-tiered chocolate drip cake lavishly decorated with fresh strawberries, raspberries, blueberries, cherries, and green leaves, sitting on a round brown cake board.
description_view_0: Front view shows the chocolate ganache drips and a dense arrangement of strawberries, raspberries, and blueberries on all tiers, with leafy accents most visible on the top.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the even distribution of fruit decorations and the layered structure of the cake, with more visible cherries and a slightly different arrangement of strawberries.
description_view_2: The chocolate drips and fruit arrangement are prominent, with a clear view of the alternating cake and cream layers and a balanced display of all fruit types.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the leafy decorations on the top tier and the symmetrical placement of fruits around the cake's circumference.
